title: Reproducibility package for why road networks leave random-graph percolation
description: Public, non-sensitive code, derived source tables, generated figures, run manifests and runbooks supporting the working manuscript 'Why road networks leave random-graph percolation: testing a local embedded-merging constraint'. Raw third-party OpenStreetMap, Geofabrik, GHSL, WDI and benchmark-network source archives are not redistributed; source links and access notes are recorded in DATASETS_AND_LINKS.csv.
